tools.name: find_tools
tools.description: Find Baseframe Labs developer tools that fit a plain-language goal, ranked. Use this first when the user describes a problem (e.g. 'make my agent's PRs reviewable').

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List the full Baseframe Labs catalogue with slugs, categories, and install commands.

tools.name: get_install
tools.description: Get the install command and links for one product by slug.

tools.name: get_mcp_config
tools.description: Get the MCP client config to wire a product's own MCP server into the user's coding agent, if it ships one.

tools.name: get_docs
tools.description: Get the full agent-readable guide for one product by slug (overview, features, setup, usage).
